# Chief Growth Engineer (CGE)

> A founder-led growth studio run by Rob Louw — a fractional growth engineer who builds paid acquisition, conversion tracking, and the data integrity that ties them together. Based in Cape Town, South Africa; working with clients worldwide.

Chief Growth Engineer (CGE) is the practice of Rob Louw, an engineer (University of Cape Town) with eight years in performance marketing. The work is growth, engineered: Google Ads, server-side conversion tracking, web builds, business systems, CRO and marketing automation — delivered hands-on and handed over as a working system the client's team can run without him.

## What CGE does
- **Fractional growth engineering / fractional CMO** — senior, hands-on growth leadership for a small number of clients at a time.
- **PPC & paid acquisition** — specialist focus on Google Ads, instrumented on real, qualified demand rather than vanity metrics.
- **Data tracking & implementation** — first-party, server-side conversion tracking you own; clean event taxonomy and data integrity.
- **Web development** — fast, conversion-focused marketing sites, landing pages and online stores.
- **Business software** — internal tools, ops dashboards, billing and the systems a growing company needs.
- **Optimization & conversion (CRO)** — structured experimentation against the highest-leverage funnel steps.
- **Data & analytics** — funnel, retention, attribution and technical SEO read into clear decisions.
- **Marketing automation** — behaviour-triggered lifecycle messaging.

## Selected, anonymized results
- Tripled the fleet for a European luxury-transport operator by rebuilding Google Ads around real demand and fixing conversion tracking end-to-end.
- Took local brands national — built the web presence, online store and systems, then scaled demand with tracking wired in from day one.
- Held fractional CMO roles at notable companies across the Middle East.

## Who it's for
Growth-stage businesses with real demand that needs building properly — ecommerce and local brands scaling up, founders formalising paid acquisition, and teams whose tracking and data can no longer be trusted.

## Engagements
- Growth Audit — 2–4 weeks
- Engine Build — 6 months
- PPC Programme — 12 months
- CRO Sprint — 8–12 weeks
- Fractional CGE — ongoing
Pricing is on request and depends on scope.

## Founder
Rob Louw — engineer (UCT), 8 years in performance marketing; specialism in Google Ads, conversion tracking and data integrity. Experience across Europe, the Middle East and South Africa. Based in Cape Town (GMT+2), flexible across US and Asian hours.
